pkgmetadata.longdescription: Caelestia is a Quickshell-based desktop shell for Hyprland (bar, launcher, notifications, lock screen, etc.). This packages the compiled C++/QML shell (the Caelestia QML plugin plus the shell config) built against Qt6 and Quickshell. Gentoo-specific fixes are baked in: QML modules install under lib64, the build version is pinned (snapshot has no git metadata), and the m3shapes dependency is pre-fetched rather than cloned during configure.
